CLIENT_ACCOUNT_DESC: Connect your Request+ account to manage requests and overlays
CLIENT_OVERLAY_URL_DESC: Add this as a Browser Source in OBS
CLIENT_MODS_ONLY_DESC: Only allow mods to request songs
CLIENT_TWITCH_CHANNEL_DESC: Your Twitch login name (lowercase, no @). Leave blank to disable !voteskip.
CLIENT_VOTE_SKIP_THRESHOLD_DESC: How many unique viewers must type !voteskip to skip the current song
CLIENT_SUBS_ONLY_DESC: Only allow subscribers and mods to request songs
CLIENT_LIMIT_PER_USER_DESC: Restrict how many active queue requests each viewer can have at once
CLIENT_AUTO_ACCEPT_SEARCH_DESC: When chat searches without a link, immediately use the first result instead of waiting for !sraccept
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINTS_DESC: Let Twitch viewers request songs through a custom channel point reward
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINT_REQUESTS_DESC: Allow the created reward to only be triggered when requesting a song (DISABLES COMMANDS).
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINTS_PROMPT_PLACEHOLDER: Redeem this to request a song.
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINTS_LOAD_FAILED: Failed to load channel point reward.
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINTS_CREATE_FAILED: Failed to create channel point reward.
CLIENT_CHANNEL_POINTS_DELETE_FAILED: Failed to delete channel point reward.
CLIENT_GTS_DESC: Allow chat to earn points by guessing songs
CLIENT_FILTER_EXPLICIT_DESC: Block explicit content from being requested
CLIENT_CIDER_TOKEN_PLACEHOLDER: Enter your Apple Music API Token
CLIENT_QUEUE_EMPTY_DESC: Songs will appear here when they're requested
OOBE_TOAST_SIGN_IN_UNAVAILABLE: Request+ sign in is only available in the desktop app.
OOBE_TOAST_OVERLAY_COPY_FAILED: Could not copy the overlay URL.
OOBE_TOAST_SAVE_FAILED: Request+ saved locally, but desktop settings could not be updated.
OOBE_TOAST_SIGN_IN_REQUIRED: Sign in to your Request+ account to continue.
OOBE_WELCOME_BADGE: Built for overlays, chat, and live music chaos
OOBE_WELCOME_DESC: Request+ can connect your Request+ account, prepare the OBS overlay, pick your music backend, and set the rules before the first song hits chat.
OOBE_WELCOME_CARD_SIGN_IN_DESC: Your Request+ account keeps desktop setup, devices, and overlays connected.
OOBE_WELCOME_CARD_PLAYBACK_DESC: Spotify, YouTube, Apple Music, or SoundCloud.
OOBE_WELCOME_CARD_RULES_DESC: Mod queue, limits, explicit filtering, and telemetry.
OOBE_ACCOUNT_DESC: Sign in to your Request+ account so this desktop client can attach to your saved devices, overlays, and request tools.
OOBE_SIGN_IN_HINT: Sign in with the account you use on requestplus.xyz.
OOBE_OVERLAY_DESC: Add this as a Browser Source when you are ready to show requests on stream.
OOBE_OVERLAY_PLACEHOLDER: Overlay URL will appear after the desktop app starts.
OOBE_MUSIC_DESC: This decides where Request+ sends playback commands and where chat searches land by default.
OOBE_PLATFORM_SPOTIFY_DESC: Best for the classic Request+ flow with broad search support.
OOBE_PLATFORM_YOUTUBE_DESC: Good for viewer links, videos, and Pear-powered playback.
OOBE_PLATFORM_APPLE_DESC: Use Cider when your stream setup runs Apple Music.
OOBE_PLATFORM_SOUNDCLOUD_DESC: Useful for remixes, creator tracks, and community music.
OOBE_RULES_DESC: Start permissive, strict, or somewhere in the middle. You can change everything later from Settings.
OOBE_RULE_ENABLE_REQUESTS_DESC: Viewers can add songs through chat commands or supported reward flows.
OOBE_RULE_MOD_QUEUE_DESC: Requests wait for approval before they can affect playback.
OOBE_RULE_MODS_ONLY_DESC: Limit requests to moderators while you are tuning the setup.
OOBE_RULE_FILTER_EXPLICIT_DESC: Block explicit results when the selected platform supports it.
OOBE_RULE_TELEMETRY_DESC: Send lightweight diagnostics to help improve Request+.
OOBE_GUIDE_CARD_TITLE: Go to our guide to get more help for setup!
